description: 30 traditional trivia clues about birthday cards, greetings, and card messages + 30 CAH-style humorous clues
research_basis: Card-making traditions, written communication, greeting card industry history, modern messaging culture, social etiquette

regular_clues.clue: The oldest surviving birthday greeting card dates back to this medieval century
This company is the world's largest greeting card manufacturer
The tradition of sending birthday cards became popular during this monarch's reign
This material is traditionally used to make greeting cards rigid
A birthday card typically contains this folded number of pages
This postage item is required to mail a birthday card
The phrase on most birthday cards followed by an exclamation mark
This artistic technique decorates birthday cards with embossed designs
Birthday cards featuring these literary characters became a collectible trend
This glittery material was added to greeting cards in the 1990s
The first commercially printed birthday cards appeared in this country
This musical element plays when you open certain modern birthday cards
regular_clues.correctQuestion: What is a music box (or electronic sound)?

regular_clues.clue: This fold-out feature creates a 3D effect in some birthday cards
Birthday cards with these biological items became a fragrant trend
This paper-cutting Japanese art decorates some Asian birthday cards
The average American receives this many birthday cards per year
This calligraphy style adorns formal birthday invitation cards
Birthday cards featuring these mythological creatures symbolize luck in Asian cultures
This wax material seals envelopes on formal birthday invitations
The greeting card industry generates approximately this many dollars annually
This printing technique creates raised ink on luxury birthday cards
Birthday cards shaped like these animals are the most popular collectible
This social media platform has largely replaced traditional birthday cards for millennials
The first electronic greeting card was sent via this communication method in 1994
This metallic foil paper coating makes cards shimmer like precious metals
Birthday cards displaying these preserved plant parts became a Victorian trend
This minimalist card design trend emerged in Scandinavian countries
The oldest known handwritten birthday greeting card was sent in this year
This percentage of birthday cards are purchased specifically for children
Birthday greeting cards made entirely of this biodegradable material became eco-friendly alternatives

cah_style_clues.clue: What your mom actually wants on her birthday card when she says 'anything nice'
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is proof you're not in jail?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Relatable parent expectations - universal experience

cah_style_clues.clue: The actual message on your work birthday card after HR made everyone sign
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'We barely know you'?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Office culture humor - everyone recognizes fake office warmth

cah_style_clues.clue: What your sibling writes in your birthday card instead of an actual message
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'Happy Birthday'?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Sibling laziness is universal relatable humor

cah_style_clues.clue: The emoji millennials use when they're too broke to buy a physical birthday card
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is the birthday cake emoji?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Millennial financial struggles - mainstream Gen Z/Millennial reference

cah_style_clues.clue: What the dollar store birthday card says on the back to justify the $1.25 price
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'We spent the same amount on card as we did on this blank inside'?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Dollar store culture is mainstream experience

cah_style_clues.clue: The thing you get when you buy a 'funny' birthday card that isn't actually funny
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is secondhand embarrassment?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Everyone's bought a bad joke card - relatable

cah_style_clues.clue: What your friend writes after forgetting your birthday for two months
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'Better late than never' with four exclamation marks?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Friend awkwardness everyone experiences

cah_style_clues.clue: The greeting card company's actual target audience when they sell 'hilarious' over-60s birthday cards
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is people who think fart jokes are timeless?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Generational humor divide - mainstream cultural observation

cah_style_clues.clue: What Karen writes in birthday cards to her MLM downlines to 'celebrate' them
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'You can do it, boss babe'?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: MLM/Karen culture is mainstream meme (passed the 'Would My Mom Know This?' test)

cah_style_clues.clue: The app where you search for birthday card text because buying one feels like too much effort
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is Google?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Lazy millennial behavior - mainstream relatable

cah_style_clues.clue: Why your divorced parents' handwriting on the birthday card is aggressively separate
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is unresolved tension?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Divorce humor - mainstream cultural experience

cah_style_clues.clue: What the inside of a Hallmark sympathy card accidentally says when you mix up cards at Target
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'Hope your death isn't too sad' (or similar mismatch)?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Mix-up humor, Hallmark/Target ubiquity, dark but reasonable

cah_style_clues.clue: The social media filter your mom uses to take a photo of your birthday card for Facebook
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is the dog filter?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Mom/Facebook filter humor - mainstream

cah_style_clues.clue: What boomer parents include in birthday cards that has inflated in cost since 1987
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is cash (or a check)?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Boomer generational humor + inflation economics are mainstream

cah_style_clues.clue: The thing Gen X birthday cards always mention that Gen Z has no idea about
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is getting older without Instagram to document it?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Generational divide on social media documentation

cah_style_clues.clue: What your ex texts you instead of sending an actual birthday card because they're petty
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'Happy Birthday' with zero punctuation?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Relationship awkwardness + texting culture humor

cah_style_clues.clue: The sentiment your therapist says you need to accept when your family forgets your birthday card
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'That's a pattern'?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Therapy culture + family dysfunction humor (mainstream Gen Z/Millennial experience)

cah_style_clues.clue: What you do with the birthday card from your toxic family member before they ask if you got it
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is hide it (or throw it out)?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Toxic family culture is mainstream discussion

cah_style_clues.clue: The passive-aggressive note your HOA president writes in your birthday card
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'Your trash cans are out front again'?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: HOA drama is mainstream suburban culture

cah_style_clues.clue: What handwriting style baby boomers use in birthday cards that looks like a ransom note
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is aggressive cursive?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Boomer handwriting is a running cultural joke

cah_style_clues.clue: The thing on Etsy birthday cards that costs $45 and is handmade by someone in Ohio
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is a basic watercolor painting of a flower?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Etsy culture + indie pricing humor (mainstream online commerce)

cah_style_clues.clue: Why the greeting card at Walgreens costs $6.99 but the card itself was made for 12 cents
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is capitalism (or greeting card industry greed)?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Anti-capitalist humor is mainstream millennial/Gen Z

cah_style_clues.clue: What you realize when you open a birthday card and find someone else's name already written in it
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'I'm not special and this was bulk-purchased'?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Generic card humor - relatable shopping experience

cah_style_clues.clue: The app your girlfriend uses to send you a birthday card because you live too far apart
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is OpenTable (or similar digital gifting)?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Long-distance relationship culture + digital alternatives

cah_style_clues.clue: What your grandmother writes in birthday cards that makes absolutely no sense contextually
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is a random Bible verse?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Grandmother stereotype - mainstream cultural observation

cah_style_clues.clue: The last person to sign the office birthday card before it reaches your desk completely blank
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is Dave from accounting?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Office culture - everyone's had a Dave

cah_style_clues.clue: Why the birthday card from your coworker who hates you says 'Have a nice day' with no 'birthday'
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is passive-aggressive hostility?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Workplace tension humor

cah_style_clues.clue: The thing influencers do with birthday cards instead of keeping them like normal people
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is photograph them for Instagram content?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Influencer culture is mainstream reference

cah_style_clues.clue: What your estranged parent writes in the birthday card they send once every five years
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is 'Thinking of you' with a signature?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: Estrangement/family dysfunction is mainstream discussion

cah_style_clues.clue: The NFT some startup tried to sell as a replacement for physical birthday cards in 2022
cah_style_clues.correctQuestion: What is a scam?
cah_style_clues.why_it_works: NFT bubble burst is mainstream cultural memory

principles_applied: Mainstream references only (Would My Mom Know This test)
Contextual clues that hint at answers
